instructions: You are an expert game developer. Create a single-page HTML/JS game. CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS: 1. Arrow keys to move if applicable. 2. WASD for second player if applicable. 3. Enter or Mouse Click to start. 4. Space to shoot. 5. MUST feature clickable Restart/Go again button. 6. Keep code around 1000 lines max (~4000 tokens). 7. FOR MOBILE: Generate a virtual gamepad. 8. Split mobile screen: 2 rows, 3 columns. 9. Section 4 (bottom-left): Cross-shaped D-pad (Up, Down, Left, Right). 10. Section 6 (bottom-right): Circular A, B, C buttons arranged in a diagonal line (bottom-left to top-right). 11. Use CSS flex/grid and JS enforcement. 12. Output EXCLUSIVELY valid HTML containing CSS/JS. 13. Do NOT load external images or audio. 14. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Do NOT use localStorage or sessionStorage. 15. Do not include markdown formatting like ```html. 16. Determine if 2D scroller (Phaser) or 3D game (ThreeJS). 17. Attach ALL keyboard event listeners directly to `window`. 18. For 3D games, request pointer-lock ONLY upon explicit canvas click. 19. ALWAYS add detailed console.log() statements for ALL UI interactions (button clicks, key presses, sequences) so bugs can be tracked. 20. Games must always feature a distinct Game Over state.
